message-brokers.name: Amazon MSK
message-brokers.description: AWS's fully managed Apache Kafka service handling provisioning, patching, and scaling of broker clusters.

message-brokers.name: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams
message-brokers.description: AWS's fully managed serverless service for ingesting and processing real-time streaming data at scale.

message-brokers.name: EMQX
message-brokers.description: Highly scalable open-source MQTT broker for connecting massive fleets of IoT devices in real time.

message-brokers.name: Apache RocketMQ
message-brokers.description: Distributed messaging and streaming platform from Alibaba with low latency and financial-grade reliability.

message-brokers.name: NSQ
message-brokers.description: Realtime distributed messaging platform built in Go for decentralized, fault-tolerant message delivery.

message-brokers.name: WarpStream
message-brokers.description: Diskless, Kafka-compatible streaming platform (now an IBM product) that stores data directly on object storage.

message-brokers.name: AutoMQ
message-brokers.description: Cloud-native, Kafka-compatible streaming engine that offloads storage to object storage for elastic scaling.

message-brokers.name: StreamNative
message-brokers.description: Managed Apache Pulsar platform from Pulsar's creators with unified streaming and Kafka-protocol support.

message-brokers.name: KubeMQ
message-brokers.description: Kubernetes-native message broker and queue delivered as a lightweight container for connecting microservices.

message-brokers.name: Cloudflare Queues
message-brokers.description: Cloudflare's managed message queue integrated with Workers for serverless producers and consumers at the edge.

data-warehouses.name: ClickHouse Cloud
data-warehouses.description: Fully managed serverless ClickHouse service with separated storage and compute and auto-scaling.

data-warehouses.name: Vertica
data-warehouses.description: Mature MPP columnar analytics database for large-scale data warehousing on-premises or in the cloud.

data-warehouses.name: Teradata Vantage
data-warehouses.description: Enterprise analytics platform and data warehouse known for very large, complex workloads at scale.

data-warehouses.name: Greenplum
data-warehouses.description: Open-source massively parallel Postgres-based analytics data warehouse for big data workloads.

data-warehouses.name: Apache Doris
data-warehouses.description: Open-source real-time MPP analytical database delivering fast queries for high-concurrency reporting.

data-warehouses.name: IBM Netezza
data-warehouses.description: IBM's appliance-based data warehouse for high-performance analytics on large enterprise datasets.

data-warehouses.name: Oracle Autonomous Data Warehouse
data-warehouses.description: Oracle's self-managing cloud data warehouse with automated tuning, patching, and scaling.

data-warehouses.name: Databend
data-warehouses.description: Open-source cloud-native data warehouse built in Rust as a cost-efficient Snowflake alternative.

data-warehouses.name: CrateDB
data-warehouses.description: Distributed SQL database combining search and analytics for storing massive volumes of data in near real time.

data-warehouses.name: Exasol
data-warehouses.description: High-performance in-memory analytics engine and data warehouse optimized for fast BI and reporting.

data-warehouses.name: Yellowbrick
data-warehouses.description: Elastic MPP SQL data warehouse built for Kubernetes that runs across cloud and on-premises environments.

search.name: Manticore Search
search.description: Fast open-source search database and Elasticsearch alternative with SQL, full-text, and vector search.

search.name: Orama
search.description: Tiny full-text, vector, and hybrid search engine that runs in the browser, server, or edge network.

search.name: Quickwit
search.description: Open-source distributed search engine for logs and traces built for cost-efficient search on object storage.

search.name: ParadeDB
search.description: Postgres extension adding Elasticsearch-grade full-text and BM25 search natively inside the database.

search.name: ZincSearch
search.description: Lightweight open-source full-text search engine written in Go as a minimal Elasticsearch alternative.

search.name: Sonic
search.description: Fast, lightweight, schema-less search backend in Rust that runs on a few megabytes of RAM.

search.name: Constructor
search.description: AI-powered ecommerce search, browse, and product discovery platform optimized for revenue metrics.

search.name: Klevu
search.description: AI-driven ecommerce site search and merchandising platform, now part of Athos Commerce.

search.name: Searchspring
search.description: Ecommerce search, merchandising, and personalization platform now part of Athos Commerce.

search.name: Glean
search.description: Enterprise search and AI assistant that indexes a company's apps and documents for unified retrieval.

workflow-automation.name: Mage
workflow-automation.description: Open-source hybrid framework for transforming and integrating data with a notebook-style pipeline editor.

workflow-automation.name: Bruin
workflow-automation.description: Open-source framework to build data pipelines with SQL and Python, with ingestion and quality checks built in.

workflow-automation.name: Tines
workflow-automation.description: No-code security and IT automation platform for building workflows that orchestrate APIs and tools.

workflow-automation.name: Microsoft Power Automate
workflow-automation.description: Microsoft's low-code automation tool for workflows across Microsoft 365 and hundreds of connectors.

workflow-automation.name: Huginn
workflow-automation.description: Open-source self-hosted system of agents that monitor the web and act on your behalf.

workflow-automation.name: Gumloop
workflow-automation.description: No-code platform for building AI-powered automations with a visual drag-and-drop workflow builder.

workflow-automation.name: Relay.app
workflow-automation.description: AI-first workflow automation tool emphasizing human-in-the-loop steps and collaborative approvals.

workflow-automation.name: Bardeen
workflow-automation.description: Browser-based AI automation tool that scrapes and moves data between web apps without code.

workflow-automation.name: Lindy
workflow-automation.description: AI-agent automation platform where natural-language assistants perform multi-step tasks across apps.

workflow-automation.name: Camunda
workflow-automation.description: Process orchestration platform pairing BPMN modeling with a scalable workflow and decision engine.
